WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Structs/X509Identit.name: displayName
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Structs/X509Identit.abstract: Name as displayed in the messaging application e.g. John Fitzgerald Kennedy

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Structs/X509Identit.name: domain
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Structs/X509Identit.abstract: DNS domain for which this identity proof was generated e.g. whitehouse.gov

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Structs/X509Identit.name: certificate
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Structs/X509Identit.abstract: PEM-encoded X509 certificate identifying this client in the MLS group.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Structs/X509Identit.name: notBefore
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Structs/X509Identit.abstract: Certificate validity start time (the X509 notBefore field).

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Structs/X509Identit.name: notAfter
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Structs/X509Identit.abstract: Certificate validity end time (the X509 notAfter field).

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Structs/WireIdentit.name: status
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Structs/WireIdentit.abstract: Status of the credential at the moment this object is created.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Structs/WireIdentit.name: credentialType
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Structs/WireIdentit.abstract: Indicates whether the credential is Basic or X509.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Structs/WireIdentit.name: x509Identity
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Structs/WireIdentit.abstract: The X509 certificate details; populated only when credential_type is X509.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Structs/HistorySecr.name: clientId
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Structs/HistorySecr.abstract: Client id of the associated history client.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Structs/HistorySecr.name: data
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Structs/HistorySecr.abstract: Opaque secret data sufficient to reconstruct a history client.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Structs/GroupInfoBu.name: ratchetTreeType
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Structs/GroupInfoBu.abstract: What kind of ratchet tree is used.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Structs/DecryptedMe.name: isActive
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Structs/DecryptedMe.abstract: False if processing this message caused the client to be removed from the group, i.e. due to a Remove commit.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Structs/DecryptedMe.name: senderClientId
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Structs/DecryptedMe.abstract: ClientId of the sender of the message being decrypted. Only present for application messages.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Structs/DecryptedMe.name: identity
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Structs/DecryptedMe.abstract: Identity claims present in the sender credential.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Structs/DecryptedMe.name: bufferedMessages
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Structs/DecryptedMe.abstract: Only set when the decrypted message is a commit.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Structs/CommitBundl.name: welcome
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Structs/CommitBundl.abstract: A welcome message, present when there are pending Add proposals.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Structs/CommitBundl.name: encryptedMessage
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Structs/CommitBundl.abstract: An encrypted message to fan out to all other conversation members in the new epoch.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Structs/BuildMetada.name: cargoDebug
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Structs/BuildMetada.abstract: Whether this build was in Debug mode (true) or Release mode (false).

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Structs/BuildMetada.name: gitDirty
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Structs/BuildMetada.abstract: true when the source code differed from the commit at the most recent git hash.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Structs/BufferedDec.name: isActive
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Structs/BufferedDec.abstract: False if processing this message caused the client to be removed from the group, i.e. due to a Remove commit.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Structs/BufferedDec.name: senderClientId
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Structs/BufferedDec.abstract: ClientId of the sender of the message being decrypted. Only present for application messages.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Structs/BufferedDec.abstract: Identity claims present in the sender credential.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Structs/BufferedDec.name: BufferedDecryptedMessage
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Structs/BufferedDec.abstract: A decrypted message that was buffered due to out-of-order delivery by the distribution service.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Structs/BuildMetada.abstract: Metadata describing the conditions of the build of this software.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Structs/CommitBundl.abstract: Information returned when a commit is created.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Structs/X509Identit.abstract: Fields from a WireIdentity that are specific to X509 credentials.

Protocols.html#/s:20WireCoreCryptoUniffi.abstract: A unique identifier for an MLS client.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Protocols/EpochObse.abstract: An EpochObserver is notified whenever a conversation’s epoch changes.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Protocols/ExternalS.name: ExternalSenderKeyProtocol
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Protocols/ExternalS.abstract: The raw public key of an external sender.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Protocols/HistoryOb.name: HistoryObserver
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Protocols/HistoryOb.abstract: A HistoryObserver is notified whenever a new history client is created.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Protocols/KeyPackag.name: KeyPackageProtocol
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Protocols/KeyPackag.abstract: A signed object describing a client’s identity and capabilities.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Protocols/KeyPackag.name: KeyPackageRefProtocol
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Protocols/KeyPackag.abstract: A lightweight distinct reference to a KeyPackage, sufficient to uniquely identify it.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Protocols/MlsTransp.name: MlsTransport
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Protocols/MlsTransp.abstract: Used by CoreCrypto to send commits or application messages to the delivery service.

Protocols.html#/s:20WireCoreCryptoUniffi.name: PkiEnvironmentProtocol
Protocols.html#/s:20WireCoreCryptoUniffi.abstract: The PKI environment used for certificate management during X509 credential acquisition.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Protocols/PkiEnviro.name: PkiEnvironmentHooks
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Protocols/PkiEnviro.abstract: Callbacks for external calls made by CoreCrypto during X509 credential acquisition.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Protocols/SecretKey.name: SecretKeyProtocol
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Protocols/SecretKey.abstract: A secret key derived from the group secret.

Functions.html#/s:20WireCoreCryptoUniffi.name: ciphersuiteDefault()
Functions.html#/s:20WireCoreCryptoUniffi.abstract: Get an instance of the default ciphersuite.

Functions.html#/s:20WireCoreCryptoUniffi.name: ciphersuiteFromU16(discriminant:)
Functions.html#/s:20WireCoreCryptoUniffi.abstract: Construct a ciphersuite enum instance from its discriminant.

Functions.html#/s:20WireCoreCryptoUniffi.name: exportDatabaseCopy(database:destinationPath:)
Functions.html#/s:20WireCoreCryptoUniffi.abstract: Export a fully vacuumed and optimized copy of the database to the specified path.

Functions.html#/s:20WireCoreCryptoUniffi.name: inMemoryDatabase(key:)
Functions.html#/s:20WireCoreCryptoUniffi.abstract: Create an in-memory database whose data will be lost when the instance is dropped.

Functions.html#/s:20WireCoreCryptoUniffi.name: migrateDatabaseKeyTypeToBytes(path:oldKey:newKey:)
Functions.html#/s:20WireCoreCryptoUniffi.abstract: Updates the key of the CoreCrypto database.

Functions.html#/s:20WireCoreCryptoUniffi.name: proteusFingerprintPrekeybundleFfi(prekey:)
Functions.html#/s:20WireCoreCryptoUniffi.abstract: Returns the hex-encoded fingerprint of the identity key contained in the given prekey bundle.

Functions.html#/s:20WireCoreCryptoUniffi.name: proteusLastResortPrekeyIdFfi()
Functions.html#/s:20WireCoreCryptoUniffi.abstract: Returns the Proteus last resort prekey ID.

Functions.html#/s:20WireCoreCryptoUniffi.name: setMaxLogLevel(level:)
Functions.html#/s:20WireCoreCryptoUniffi.abstract: Sets the maximum log level forwarded to the logger.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Enums/PkiEnvironmen.name: Error(reason:)
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Enums/PkiEnvironmen.abstract: An error with the given reason string.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Enums/MlsTransportE.name: MessageRejected(reason:)
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Enums/MlsTransportE.abstract: The delivery service rejected the outgoing MLS message.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Enums/MlsRatchetTre.name: delta
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Enums/MlsRatchetTre.abstract: Only changes since the previous epoch are included.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Enums/MlsRatchetTre.name: byRef
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Enums/MlsRatchetTre.abstract: The ratchet tree is identified by an external reference rather than included inline.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Enums/MlsError.html.name: ConversationAlreadyExists(conversationId:)
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Enums/MlsError.html.abstract: The byte vector included in this error variant is the raw conversation id.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Enums/MlsError.html.name: OrphanWelcome
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Enums/MlsError.html.abstract: A Welcome message references a KeyPackage that has already been deleted locally.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Enums/E2eiConversat.name: verified
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Enums/E2eiConversat.abstract: All clients have a valid E2EI certificate.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Enums/E2eiConversat.name: notVerified
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Enums/E2eiConversat.abstract: Some clients are either still using Basic credentials or their certificate has expired.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Enums/E2eiConversat.name: notEnabled
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Enums/E2eiConversat.abstract: All clients are still using Basic credentials.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Enums/DeviceStatus..name: revoked
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Enums/DeviceStatus..abstract: The device credential’s certificate has been revoked.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Enums/CredentialTyp.name: basic
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Enums/CredentialTyp.abstract: A basic credential backed by a raw key pair, without any certificate infrastructure.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Enums/CredentialTyp.name: x509
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Enums/CredentialTyp.abstract: An X509 certificate credential, typically obtained through the end-to-end identity enrollment process.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Enums/CoreCryptoErr.name: E2ei(e2eiError:)
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Enums/CoreCryptoErr.abstract: An error from the end-to-end identity layer.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Enums/CoreCryptoErr.name: TransactionFailed(error:)
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Enums/CoreCryptoErr.abstract: A transaction was rolled back due to an unexpected callback error.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Enums/Ciphersuite.h.name: mls128Dhkemp256Aes128gcmSha256P256
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Enums/Ciphersuite.h.abstract: DH KEM P256 | AES-GCM 128 | SHA2-256 | EcDSA P256

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Enums/Ciphersuite.h.name: mls256Dhkemp521Aes256gcmSha512P521
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Enums/Ciphersuite.h.abstract: DH KEM P521 | AES-GCM 256 | SHA2-512 | EcDSA P521

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Enums/Ciphersuite.h.name: mls256Dhkemp384Aes256gcmSha384P384
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Enums/Ciphersuite.h.abstract: DH KEM P384 | AES-GCM 256 | SHA2-384 | EcDSA P384

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Enums/CoreCryptoErr.name: CoreCryptoError
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Enums/CoreCryptoErr.abstract: The primary error type returned across the CoreCrypto FFI boundary.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Enums/CredentialTyp.name: CredentialType
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Enums/CredentialTyp.abstract: The type of credential used to authenticate an MLS client’s identity.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Enums/DeviceStatus..name: DeviceStatus
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Enums/DeviceStatus..abstract: The standalone status of a device credential in an MLS group at a given moment.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Enums/E2eiConversat.name: E2eiConversationState
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Enums/E2eiConversat.abstract: The end-to-end identity verification state of a conversation.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Enums/EpochChangedR.name: EpochChangedReportingError
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Enums/EpochChangedR.abstract: An error returned by an EpochObserver callback implementation.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Enums/LoggingError..name: LoggingError
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Enums/LoggingError..abstract: An error returned by a CoreCryptoLogger callback implementation.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Enums/MlsGroupInfoE.name: MlsGroupInfoEncryptionType
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Enums/MlsGroupInfoE.abstract: How a GroupInfo is encrypted in a commit bundle.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Enums/MlsRatchetTre.name: MlsRatchetTreeType
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Enums/MlsRatchetTre.abstract: How the ratchet tree is represented in a GroupInfo.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Enums/MlsTransportE.name: MlsTransportError
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Enums/MlsTransportE.abstract: Errors returned by MLS transport callbacks exposed through FFI.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Enums/NewHistoryCli.name: NewHistoryClientReportingError
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Enums/NewHistoryCli.abstract: An error returned by a HistoryObserver callback implementation.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Enums/PkiEnvironmen.name: PkiEnvironmentHooksError
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Enums/PkiEnvironmen.abstract: An error returned by a PkiEnvironmentHooks callback implementation.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Enums/SignatureSche.name: SignatureScheme
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Enums/SignatureSche.abstract: Signature schemes supported by MLS, as defined in RFC 9420.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/Welcome.htm.abstract: Fallibly instantiate an instance from a byte array.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/DatabaseKey.abstract: Fallibly instantiate an instance from a byte array.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/CoreCryptoF.abstract: Returns the ciphersuite in use for the given conversation.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/CoreCryptoF.abstract: Set the PKI environment of the CoreCrypto instance.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/CoreCryptoF.abstract: Starts a new transaction in Core Crypto. If the callback succeeds, it will be committed,

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/CoreCryptoC.abstract: Adds a Credential to this client.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/CoreCryptoC.abstract: Commits all pending proposals in the conversation, sending the resulting commit via the transport.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/CoreCryptoC.abstract: Returns the ciphersuite in use for the given conversation.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/CoreCryptoC.name: conversationCredential(conversationId:)
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/CoreCryptoC.abstract: Get the credential ref for the given conversation.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/CoreCryptoC.name: conversationEpoch(conversationId:)
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/CoreCryptoC.abstract: Returns the current MLS epoch of the given conversation.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/CoreCryptoC.name: conversationExists(conversationId:)
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/CoreCryptoC.abstract: Returns true if a conversation with the given id exists in the local state.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/CoreCryptoC.abstract: Enables history sharing for the given conversation.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/CoreCryptoC.abstract: Encrypts a plaintext message for all members of the given conversation.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/CoreCryptoC.abstract: Derives and exports a secret of key_length bytes for the given conversation.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/CoreCryptoC.abstract: Get all credentials from this client which match the provided parameters.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/CoreCryptoC.abstract: Generate a KeyPackage from the referenced credential.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/CoreCryptoC.name: getClientIds(conversationId:)
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/CoreCryptoC.abstract: Returns the client ids of all members of the given conversation.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/CoreCryptoC.abstract: Get all credentials from this client.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/CoreCryptoC.abstract: Returns data previously stored by set_data, or None if no data has been stored.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/CoreCryptoC.abstract: Returns the E2EI identity claims for the specified devices in the given conversation.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/CoreCryptoC.abstract: Returns the serialized public key of the external sender for the given conversation.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/CoreCryptoC.abstract: Returns the hex-encoded local public key fingerprint for the Proteus session with the given ID.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/CoreCryptoC.name: proteusSessionExists(sessionId:)
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/CoreCryptoC.abstract: Returns true if a Proteus session with the given ID exists in local storage.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/CoreCryptoC.name: proteusSessionFromMessage(sessionId:envelope:)
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/CoreCryptoC.abstract: Creates a new Proteus session from an incoming encrypted message, returning the decrypted message payload.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/CoreCryptoC.name: proteusSessionFromPrekey(sessionId:prekey:)
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/CoreCryptoC.abstract: Creates a new Proteus session from the given prekey bundle bytes, stored under the given session ID.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/CoreCryptoC.name: proteusSessionSave(sessionId:)
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/CoreCryptoC.abstract: Saves the Proteus session with the given ID to the keystore.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/CoreCryptoC.name: randomBytes(len:)
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/CoreCryptoC.abstract: Generates len random bytes from the cryptographically secure RNG.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/CoreCryptoC.name: removeClientsFromConversation(conversationId:clients:)
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/CoreCryptoC.abstract: Removes the specified clients from the conversation, sending the resulting commit via the transport.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/CoreCryptoC.name: removeCredential(credentialRef:)
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/CoreCryptoC.abstract: Removes a Credential from this client.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/CoreCryptoC.name: removeKeyPackage(kpRef:)
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/CoreCryptoC.abstract: Remove a KeyPackage from the database.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/CoreCryptoC.name: removeKeyPackagesFor(credentialRef:)
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/CoreCryptoC.abstract: Remove all KeyPackages associated with this credential ref.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/CoreCryptoC.name: setConversationCredential(conversationId:credentialRef:)
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/CoreCryptoC.abstract: Set the credential ref for the given conversation.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/CoreCryptoC.name: setData(data:)
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/CoreCryptoC.abstract: Stores arbitrary data to be used as a transaction checkpoint.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/CoreCryptoC.name: updateKeyingMaterial(conversationId:)
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/CoreCryptoC.abstract: Updates this client’s key material in the conversation by sending an update commit.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/CoreCryptoC.name: wipeConversation(conversationId:)
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/CoreCryptoC.abstract: Destroys the local state of the given conversation; it can no longer be used locally after this call.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/CoreCryptoC.name: execute(context:)
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/CoreCryptoC.abstract: Will be called inside a transaction in CoreCrypto

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/Conversatio.name: init(bytes:)
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/Conversatio.abstract: Infallibly instantiate an instance from a byte array.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/Conversatio.name: copyBytes()
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/Conversatio.abstract: Copy the wrapped data into a new byte array.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/ClientId.ht.name: init(bytes:)
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/ClientId.ht.abstract: Infallibly instantiate an instance from a byte array.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/ClientId.ht.name: copyBytes()
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/ClientId.ht.abstract: Copy the wrapped data into a new byte array.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/Database.ht.name: open(key:)
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/Database.ht.abstract: Initialise an in-memory Database whose data will be lost when the instance is dropped.

WireCoreCrypto/Classes/CoreCrypto.html#/.name: init(database:)
WireCoreCrypto/Classes/CoreCrypto.html#/.abstract: Initialise CoreCrypto with an encrypted key store.

WireCoreCrypto/Classes/CoreCrypto.html.name: CoreCrypto
WireCoreCrypto/Classes/CoreCrypto.html.abstract: CoreCrypto client which manages one cryptographic client for proteus and MLS.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/PkiEnvironm.name: PkiEnvironment
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/PkiEnvironm.abstract: The PKI environment used for certificate management during X509 credential acquisition.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/Database.ht.name: Database
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/Database.ht.abstract: The database acting as a core crypto keystore.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/ClientId.ht.name: ClientId
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/ClientId.ht.abstract: A unique identifier for an MLS client.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/Conversatio.name: ConversationId
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/Conversatio.abstract: A unique identifier for a single conversation.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/CoreCryptoC.name: CoreCryptoCommandImpl
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/CoreCryptoC.abstract: A CoreCryptoCommand has an execute method which accepts a CoreCryptoContext and returns nothing.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/CoreCryptoC.name: CoreCryptoContext
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/CoreCryptoC.abstract: The CoreCryptoContext holds the primary CoreCrypto APIs.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/CoreCryptoF.name: CoreCryptoFfi
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/CoreCryptoF.abstract: CoreCrypto wraps around MLS and Proteus implementations and provides a transactional interface for each.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/CoreCryptoL.name: CoreCryptoLoggerImpl
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/CoreCryptoL.abstract: A callback interface for forwarding CoreCrypto log messages to the platform’s logging system.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/CredentialR.name: CredentialRef
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/CredentialR.abstract: A compact reference to a credential that has been persisted in CoreCrypto.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/DatabaseKey.name: DatabaseKey
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/DatabaseKey.abstract: A unique identifier for an MLS client.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/EpochObserv.name: EpochObserverImpl
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/EpochObserv.abstract: An EpochObserver is notified whenever a conversation’s epoch changes.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/ExternalSen.name: ExternalSenderKey
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/ExternalSen.abstract: The raw public key of an external sender.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/HistoryObse.name: HistoryObserverImpl
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/HistoryObse.abstract: A HistoryObserver is notified whenever a new history client is created.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/KeyPackage..name: KeyPackage
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/KeyPackage..abstract: A signed object describing a client’s identity and capabilities.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/KeyPackageR.name: KeyPackageRef
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/KeyPackageR.abstract: A lightweight distinct reference to a KeyPackage, sufficient to uniquely identify it.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/MlsTranspor.name: MlsTransportImpl
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/MlsTranspor.abstract: Used by CoreCrypto to send commits or application messages to the delivery service.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/PkiEnvironm.name: PkiEnvironmentHooksImpl
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/PkiEnvironm.abstract: Callbacks for external calls made by CoreCrypto during X509 credential acquisition.

WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/SecretKey.h.name: SecretKey
WireCoreCryptoUniffi/Classes/SecretKey.h.abstract: A secret key derived from the group secret.

Typealiases.html.name: Type Aliases
Typealiases.html.abstract: The following type aliases are available globally.
